title: INVOKE Message
description: RCAN message type 11. Triggers a named skill or behavior on the target robot runtime (§19). The receiver must respond with an INVOKE_RESULT message referencing the same msg_id.

message_type.description: Identifies this as an INVOKE message.

principal_id.description: Identity of the invoking principal — a user UUID, AI agent ID, or service account name.

session_token.description: Valid JWT session token authorising this invocation.

params.description: Skill-specific input parameters. Schema varies by skill.

msg_id.description: UUIDv4 correlation identifier. The corresponding INVOKE_RESULT must echo this value in its reply_to field.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum milliseconds the caller will wait for an INVOKE_RESULT. The runtime SHOULD cancel execution and return a timeout result if exceeded. Defaults to 30000 (30 s) when omitted.

reply_to_ruri.description: Optional RURI where INVOKE_RESULT should be sent. Defaults to the invoking principal's RURI when omitted.

priority.description: Message priority. SAFETY priority messages bypass the queue (Safety Invariant 6).

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when the INVOKE was sent.

message_id.description: UUIDv4 uniquely identifying this message envelope.
